resources.string: Build lasting habits and track your streaks with ease. Let\'s get started on your journey to consistency.
Mark habits as completed daily and watch your streaks grow. Visualize your consistency over time.
Set custom reminders for each habit to stay on track and achieve your goals.
Start building good habits! Tap the '+' button to add your first habit.
Failed to load habits. Please try again.
You are offline. Data might be outdated.

Edit Habit Habit Name e.g., Drink Water, Read Book Description (Optional) e.g., Drink 8 glasses, Read 30 pages Frequency Daily Specific Days of Week Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun Reminder Time (Optional) Set Time Clear Time Save Habit Habit name cannot be empty. Habit saved successfully! Habit updated successfully! Failed to save habit. Please try again. Notification Permission Required To send you habit reminders, StreakWise needs notification permission. Please grant it in settings. Grant Permission No description provided.
Habit Details Current Streak Longest Streak History Edit Habit Archive Habit Delete Habit Delete Habit? Are you sure you want to permanently delete "%1$s" and all its completion data? This cannot be undone. Archive Habit? Are you sure you want to archive "%1$s"? It will no longer appear on your dashboard but can be restored later. Cancel Delete Archive Habit deleted successfully. Habit archived successfully. Failed to delete habit. Failed to archive habit. Completed Missed Unknown No History Yet Start tracking your habit to see its progress here. Failed to load habit details. Day %1$d, %2$s Previous month Next month Back
Settings General Enable Global Reminders About App Privacy Policy Legal Notification settings updated. Failed to update notification settings. ca-app-pub-3940256099942544/6300978111 ca-app-pub-3940256099942544/1033173712
About StreakWise Version 1.0.0 Developed by Android Forge StreakWise helps you build and maintain positive habits by tracking your progress and streaks. Stay motivated and achieve your goals with ease.
Privacy Policy This is a placeholder for the Privacy Policy content. In a production app, this would contain the actual legal text regarding data collection, usage, and user rights. For now, assume a detailed policy would be loaded here or linked to an external URL.
Permission denied. Some features may not work without it. Failed to load settings. Please try again.
